header.subtitle: Engineering Expertise
header.description: A comprehensive toolkit built through industry experience, research, and hands-on aerospace engineering projects spanning structures, propulsion, simulation, and software.

items.name: Structural Analysis
items.details: Finite Element Analysis (FEA), stress analysis, load path evaluation, Margin of Safety (MoS), structural validation

items.name: Propulsion
items.details: Rocket propulsion, nozzle analysis, combustion fundamentals, NASA CEA, thermal protection systems

items.name: CFD & Aerodynamics
items.details: ANSYS Fluent, airfoil analysis, external aerodynamics, flow visualization, performance prediction

items.name: Simulation
items.details: Numerical modeling, finite element simulation, structural validation, engineering optimization

items.name: Programming
items.details: Python, MATLAB, engineering automation, data analysis, ESP32, Arduino

items.name: CAD & Design
items.details: SolidWorks, CATIA V5, GD&T, design for manufacturing, aerospace assemblies

summary.subtitle: Engineering Philosophy
summary.title: Design. Simulate. Validate.
summary.description: I combine analytical thinking with engineering software and hands-on experimentation to design, simulate, and validate aerospace systems from concept through certification.
